heading: Get Started
body:
The following tutorial demonstrates how to build an AI agent using
MongoDB for agentic RAG and memory, without an agent framework.

***

➤ Use the **Select your language** drop-down menu to set the
language for this tutorial.

***

drivers

Node.js

Python

Work with a runnable version of this tutorial as a [Python notebook](https://github.com/mongodb/docs-notebooks/blob/main/use-cases/ai-agent.ipynb).
